name: malacca_strait_routes
description: Strait of Malacca Traffic Separation Scheme lanes and approach corridors for simulation background traffic

properties.name: Malacca TSS — Northwestbound Lane
properties.description: IMO Traffic Separation Scheme northwestbound lane. Ships transiting from Singapore toward Penang / Andaman Sea. Runs along the Sumatran side of the separation zone.

properties.name: Malacca TSS — Southeastbound Lane
properties.description: IMO Traffic Separation Scheme southeastbound lane. Ships transiting from Penang / Andaman Sea toward Singapore. Runs closer to the Malaysian west coast.

properties.name: KLIA–Malacca Air Approach Corridor
properties.description: Standard commercial air traffic corridor between Kuala Lumpur International Airport and the Malacca/southern Johor approach sector. Used by domestic and regional short-haul flights.

properties.name: Malacca–Ipoh West Coast Corridor
properties.description: North–south air and overland corridor along the west coast of Peninsular Malaysia, connecting Malacca to Ipoh via Seremban, Kuala Lumpur and Rawang.
